raw.subject: Your Yakima page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the photos of happy dogs you share on your Facebook page - Ozzy and Sam's visit with Jen is always a highlight. Your Yakima location and focus on pet care really shine through.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which may mean you're missing out on potential bookings and customers who would love to see your services and beautiful work.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea based on the photos and stories you share on Facebook, with sections for grooming services and a photo gallery showcasing your work. I thought you might appreciate this.

https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/paws-claws-dog-grooming-yakima/

This is just a starting point, and I'd love to chat with you about bringing it to life. Let's discuss the details and a flat fee for local businesses. Reply or give me a quick call to explore further.
